meta.title: Initialize Bun project with Elysia and Effect architecture setup

subtask.role: You are a TypeScript Engineer specializing in Effect and Bun/Elysia. Implement subtask 3.1.

context.overview: Set up the foundational project structure with Bun runtime, Elysia web framework, and Effect TypeScript services architecture including basic service definitions.
context.parent_task: Build Integration Service with Effect (Nova - Bun/Elysia)

requirements.description: Initialize Bun project with package.json, install Elysia and Effect dependencies, create project structure with src/services, src/schemas, src/routes directories, set up basic Effect services (SlackService, DiscordService, EmailService) with proper type definitions and error handling interfaces, configure TypeScript with Effect-specific settings
